name: desktop
description: Windows desktop shell for Rdesign (Electron + Next standalone)
author: Rdesign

scripts.build:desktop: node scripts/ensure-app-builder.cjs && node scripts/prepare-icon.cjs && node scripts/prepare-next.cjs && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.build:desktop:dir: node scripts/ensure-app-builder.cjs && node scripts/prepare-icon.cjs && node scripts/prepare-next.cjs && electron-builder --win dir --x64 --config electron-builder.config.cjs
scripts.build:desktop:from-root: cd ../.. && npx turbo run build:desktop --log-order stream
scripts.build:desktop:local-electron: node scripts/ensure-app-builder.cjs && node scripts/ensure-local-electron-env.cjs && node scripts/prepare-icon.cjs && node scripts/prepare-next.cjs && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.cjs
